title: acanthophyllum fontanesii var. glandulosum
intro: Acanthophyllum fontanesii var. glandulosum, also known as Glandular Acanthophyllum, is a shrubby perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems which are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Acanthophyllum fontanesii var. glandulosum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
